description: This pipeline is designed to process and transform data by first merging annotations from multiple sources, and then converting the resulting data into a unified annotation table that contains all relevant information, allowing for further analysis and processing.

e47ae185-6974-4bf8-96bb-93e2d49c3d03.name: data-to-annotation-table
e47ae185-6974-4bf8-96bb-93e2d49c3d03.description:
Converts data into an annotation table that contains all annotations of the data row. You can also add a string representation of the data.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

30041eea-d209-49c4-b866-567eff783485.name: annotation-merge
30041eea-d209-49c4-b866-567eff783485.description:
Merges the annotations of all incoming data and outputs the same data with those merged annotations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
